title: Lightsabers Pack
description: Lightsaber Pack replaces all swords with lightsabers from the Star Wars universe. Each sword type has its own unique blade color — from the dark Darksaber to the iconic red Sith blade.
body:
Have you ever wanted to wield a lightsaber in Minecraft? This texture pack replaces every sword in the game with an iconic lightsaber from the Star Wars universe, each with its own unique color and design.
Built for the classic 16x16 Minecraft art style, the pack supports versions 1.8.9 and 1.21.0 through 1.21.11. Each version comes as a separate ready-to-use ZIP. No mods required — just drop it into your resourcepacks folder, activate it in settings, and you're good to go.
Only sword textures are changed. Everything else stays untouched.

Made by Buky50_
